es.endangerment: La recolección para el comercio ilegal de mascotas y el secado de arroyos relacionado con la sequía han reducido aún más esta ya diminuta población.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Arroyos de piedra caliza fríos y de flujo rápido en gargantas de montaña rocosas de la provincia de Lorestan, Irán, a altitud moderada a alta.
es.actions: Apoya la conservación de anfibios iraníes, presiona contra el comercio ilegal de reptiles y anfibios como mascotas, y denuncia las ventas ilegales de fauna silvestre en línea.

pt.description: O tritão-de-luristan é uma salamandra de marcante coloração preto e branco encontrada apenas em alguns riachos frios e claros nas montanhas Zagros do Irã.
pt.endangerment: A coleta para o comércio ilegal de animais de estimação e o secamento de riachos relacionado à seca reduziram ainda mais essa já minúscula população.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Riachos de calcário frios e de fluxo rápido em gargantas rochosas de montanha na Província de Lorestan, Irã, em altitude moderada a alta.
pt.actions: Apoie a conservação de anfíbios iranianos, faça lobby contra o comércio ilegal de répteis e anfíbios como animais de estimação, e denuncie vendas ilegais de animais selvagens online.

fr.description: Le triton du Luristan est une salamandre au marquage frappant noir et blanc, que l'on ne trouve que dans quelques ruisseaux froids et clairs des monts Zagros en Iran.
fr.endangerment: La collecte pour le commerce illégal d'animaux de compagnie et l'assèchement des ruisseaux lié à la sécheresse ont encore réduit cette population déjà infime.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des ruisseaux calcaires froids et rapides dans des gorges rocheuses montagneuses de la province du Lorestan, en Iran, à des altitudes modérées à élevées.
fr.actions: Soutenez la conservation des amphibiens iraniens, faites pression contre le commerce illégal de reptiles et d'amphibiens de compagnie, et signalez les ventes illégales de faune sauvage en ligne.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: Rabbs' fringe-limbed treefrog was a large, gliding frog from central Panama, known for paternal care; the last known individual died in 2016.
endangerment: The chytrid fungus pandemic wiped out wild populations with devastating speed. No confirmed wild survivors have been reported since.
ecosystemNeeds: Humid mountain forest in central Panama with water-filled tree holes for egg-laying and tadpole development.
actions: Support amphibian disease research funding, back the global Amphibian Ark captive assurance programme, and advocate for chytrid control measures in affected areas.

en.description: Rabbs' fringe-limbed treefrog was a large, gliding frog from central Panama, known for paternal care; the last known individual died in 2016.
en.endangerment: The chytrid fungus pandemic wiped out wild populations with devastating speed. No confirmed wild survivors have been reported since.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Humid mountain forest in central Panama with water-filled tree holes for egg-laying and tadpole development.
en.actions: Support amphibian disease research funding, back the global Amphibian Ark captive assurance programme, and advocate for chytrid control measures in affected areas.

es.description: La rana arborícola de Rabb era una gran rana planeadora de Panamá central, conocida por el cuidado paterno; el último individuo conocido murió en 2016.
es.endangerment: La pandemia del hongo quitridio devastó las poblaciones silvestres con asombrosa rapidez. No se han reportado supervivientes silvestres confirmados desde entonces.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque de montaña húmedo en Panamá central con agujeros en árboles llenos de agua para la puesta de huevos y el desarrollo de renacuajos.
es.actions: Apoya el financiamiento de investigaciones sobre enfermedades de anfibios, respalda el programa global de arca en cautiverio Amphibian Ark y aboga por medidas de control del quitridio en áreas afectadas.

pt.description: A rã-arborícola-de-Rabb era uma grande rã planadora do Panamá central, conhecida pelo cuidado paterno; o último indivíduo conhecido morreu em 2016.
pt.endangerment: A pandemia do fungo quitrídio devastou as populações selvagens com velocidade devastadora. Nenhum sobrevivente selvagem confirmado foi relatado desde então.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta de montanha úmida no Panamá central com buracos em árvores cheios de água para postura de ovos e desenvolvimento de girinos.
pt.actions: Apoie o financiamento de pesquisas sobre doenças de anfíbios, respalda o programa global de arca em cativeiro Amphibian Ark e defenda medidas de controle do quitrídio nas áreas afetadas.

fr.description: La rainette de Rabb était une grande grenouille planante du Panamá central, connue pour les soins paternels ; le dernier individu connu est mort en 2016.
fr.endangerment: La pandémie de champignon chytride a décimé les populations sauvages à une vitesse dévastatrice. Aucun survivant sauvage confirmé n'a été signalé depuis.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt de montagne humide au centre du Panamá avec des trous dans les arbres remplis d'eau pour la ponte des œufs et le développement des têtards.
fr.actions: Soutenez le financement de la recherche sur les maladies des amphibiens, appuyez le programme mondial d'arche en captivité Amphibian Ark et plaidez pour des mesures de contrôle du chytride dans les zones touchées.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The Titicaca water frog is one of the world's largest aquatic frogs, living entirely underwater in Lake Titicaca on the Peru–Bolivia border.
endangerment: Pollution from untreated sewage and mining runoff entering the lake, overharvesting for food and traditional medicine, and invasive trout have all taken a toll.
ecosystemNeeds: Cold, well-oxygenated waters of Lake Titicaca and its tributaries, with rocky substrates for shelter and abundant aquatic invertebrate prey.
actions: Support lake pollution control programmes, back local harvesting bans, and advocate for improved wastewater treatment infrastructure around Lake Titicaca.

en.description: The Titicaca water frog is one of the world's largest aquatic frogs, living entirely underwater in Lake Titicaca on the Peru–Bolivia border.
en.endangerment: Pollution from untreated sewage and mining runoff entering the lake, overharvesting for food and traditional medicine, and invasive trout have all taken a toll.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Cold, well-oxygenated waters of Lake Titicaca and its tributaries, with rocky substrates for shelter and abundant aquatic invertebrate prey.
en.actions: Support lake pollution control programmes, back local harvesting bans, and advocate for improved wastewater treatment infrastructure around Lake Titicaca.

es.description: La rana del lago Titicaca es una de las ranas acuáticas más grandes del mundo, que vive completamente bajo el agua en el lago Titicaca en la frontera Perú-Bolivia.
es.endangerment: La contaminación del lago por aguas residuales sin tratar y desechos mineros, la sobreexplotación para alimento y medicina tradicional, y la trucha invasora han causado daños significativos.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Aguas frías y bien oxigenadas del lago Titicaca y sus afluentes, con sustratos rocosos para refugio y abundante presa invertebrada acuática.
es.actions: Apoya los programas de control de la contaminación del lago, respalda las prohibiciones de cosecha local y aboga por mejorar la infraestructura de tratamiento de aguas residuales alrededor del lago Titicaca.

pt.description: A rã-do-lago-titicaca é uma das maiores rãs aquáticas do mundo, vivendo completamente debaixo d'água no Lago Titicaca na fronteira Peru-Bolívia.
pt.endangerment: A poluição do lago por esgotos não tratados e resíduos minerários, a superexplotação para alimentação e medicina tradicional, e a truta invasora causaram danos significativos.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Águas frias e bem oxigenadas do Lago Titicaca e seus afluentes, com substratos rochosos para abrigo e abundante presa de invertebrados aquáticos.
pt.actions: Apoie programas de controle da poluição do lago, respalda proibições de colheita local e defenda melhorias na infraestrutura de tratamento de esgoto ao redor do Lago Titicaca.

fr.description: La grenouille géante du lac Titicaca est l'une des plus grandes grenouilles aquatiques au monde, vivant entièrement sous l'eau dans le lac Titicaca à la frontière Pérou-Bolivie.
fr.endangerment: La pollution du lac par les eaux usées non traitées et les rejets miniers, la surexploitation pour l'alimentation et la médecine traditionnelle, ainsi que la truite envahissante ont causé des dommages significatifs.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des eaux froides et bien oxygénées du lac Titicaca et de ses affluents, avec des substrats rocheux pour s'abriter et d'abondantes proies d'invertébrés aquatiques.
fr.actions: Soutenez les programmes de contrôle de la pollution du lac, appuyez les interdictions de récolte locale et plaidez pour l'amélioration des infrastructures de traitement des eaux usées autour du lac Titicaca.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The ploughshare tortoise is Madagascar's rarest tortoise, prized for its beautiful dome and a prime target for illegal collection for the exotic pet trade.
endangerment: Poaching for the black-market exotic pet trade is the primary driver. Traffickers use GPS to locate tortoises in the wild, outpacing conservation efforts.
ecosystemNeeds: Dense dry scrub and bamboo thicket near the Baly Bay National Park in northwest Madagascar, with access to fruiting plants.
actions: Support the Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust's ploughshare programme, back customs enforcement training to intercept smuggled tortoises, and never buy wild-caught tortoises.

en.description: The ploughshare tortoise is Madagascar's rarest tortoise, prized for its beautiful dome and a prime target for illegal collection for the exotic pet trade.
en.endangerment: Poaching for the black-market exotic pet trade is the primary driver. Traffickers use GPS to locate tortoises in the wild, outpacing conservation efforts.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Dense dry scrub and bamboo thicket near the Baly Bay National Park in northwest Madagascar, with access to fruiting plants.
en.actions: Support the Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust's ploughshare programme, back customs enforcement training to intercept smuggled tortoises, and never buy wild-caught tortoises.

es.description: La tortuga arado es la tortuga más rara de Madagascar, codiciada por su hermoso caparazón y objetivo principal de la recolección ilegal para el comercio de mascotas exóticas.
es.endangerment: La caza furtiva para el mercado negro de mascotas exóticas es el principal impulsor. Los traficantes usan GPS para localizar tortugas en la naturaleza, superando los esfuerzos de conservación.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Matorral seco denso y bambusal cerca del Parque Nacional de Baly Bay en el noroeste de Madagascar, con acceso a plantas con frutos.
es.actions: Apoya el programa de tortuga arado de Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust, respalda el entrenamiento de aduanas para interceptar tortugas de contrabando y nunca compres tortugas capturadas en la naturaleza.

pt.description: A tartaruga-arado é a tartaruga mais rara de Madagascar, valorizada por sua bela cúpula e alvo principal da coleta ilegal para o comércio de animais de estimação exóticos.
pt.endangerment: O braconagem para o mercado negro de animais de estimação exóticos é o principal motor. Traficantes usam GPS para localizar tartarugas na natureza, superando os esforços de conservação.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Mata seca densa e bambuzal próximo ao Parque Nacional de Baly Bay no noroeste de Madagascar, com acesso a plantas frutíferas.
pt.actions: Apoie o programa de tartaruga-arado do Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust, respalda o treinamento aduaneiro para interceptar tartarugas contrabandeadas e nunca compre tartarugas capturadas na natureza.

fr.description: La tortue à soc est la tortue la plus rare de Madagascar, prisée pour sa belle carapace bombée et principale cible de la collecte illégale pour le commerce des animaux de compagnie exotiques.
fr.endangerment: Le braconnage pour le marché noir des animaux de compagnie exotiques est le principal moteur. Les trafiquants utilisent le GPS pour localiser les tortues dans la nature, dépassant les efforts de conservation.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Fourré sec dense et bambouseraie près du parc national de Baly Bay dans le nord-ouest de Madagascar, avec accès à des plantes fruitières.
fr.actions: Soutenez le programme de tortue à soc du Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust, encouragez la formation douanière pour intercepter les tortues de contrebande et n'achetez jamais de tortues capturées dans la nature.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The Philippine crocodile is a small freshwater crocodile endemic to the Philippines and one of the most endangered crocodilians in the world.
endangerment: Persecution by local communities, unsustainable fishing practices that reduce prey, and wetland conversion have pushed it towards extinction.
ecosystemNeeds: Freshwater rivers, lakes, and marshes in the Philippines, particularly in Mindanao and the northern islands, with undisturbed bankside vegetation for nesting.
actions: Support community-based conservation in Mindanao, fund local guardian programmes that pay communities to protect nests, and back wetland restoration.

en.description: The Philippine crocodile is a small freshwater crocodile endemic to the Philippines and one of the most endangered crocodilians in the world.
en.endangerment: Persecution by local communities, unsustainable fishing practices that reduce prey, and wetland conversion have pushed it towards extinction.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Freshwater rivers, lakes, and marshes in the Philippines, particularly in Mindanao and the northern islands, with undisturbed bankside vegetation for nesting.
en.actions: Support community-based conservation in Mindanao, fund local guardian programmes that pay communities to protect nests, and back wetland restoration.

es.description: El cocodrilo filipino es un pequeño cocodrilo de agua dulce endémico de Filipinas y uno de los cocodrilos más amenazados del mundo.
es.endangerment: La persecución por las comunidades locales, las prácticas pesqueras insostenibles que reducen las presas y la conversión de humedales lo han empujado hacia la extinción.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Ríos, lagos y pantanos de agua dulce en Filipinas, especialmente en Mindanao y las islas del norte, con vegetación ribereña sin perturbaciones para anidar.
es.actions: Apoya la conservación comunitaria en Mindanao, financia programas locales de guardianes que pagan a las comunidades para proteger nidos y respalda la restauración de humedales.

pt.description: O crocodilo-filipino é um pequeno crocodilo de água doce endêmico das Filipinas e um dos crocodilianos mais ameaçados do mundo.
pt.endangerment: A perseguição por comunidades locais, práticas pesqueiras insustentáveis que reduzem as presas e a conversão de zonas úmidas o empurraram para a extinção.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Rios, lagos e pântanos de água doce nas Filipinas, especialmente em Mindanao e nas ilhas do norte, com vegetação ribeirinha sem perturbações para a nidificação.
pt.actions: Apoie a conservação comunitária em Mindanao, financie programas locais de guardiões que pagam comunidades para proteger ninhos e apoie a restauração de zonas úmidas.

fr.description: Le crocodile des Philippines est un petit crocodile d'eau douce endémique des Philippines et l'un des crocodiliens les plus menacés au monde.
fr.endangerment: Les persécutions par les communautés locales, les pratiques de pêche non durables qui réduisent les proies et la conversion des zones humides l'ont poussé vers l'extinction.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Rivières, lacs et marais d'eau douce aux Philippines, notamment à Mindanao et dans les îles du nord, avec une végétation riveraine non perturbée pour la nidification.
fr.actions: Soutenez la conservation communautaire à Mindanao, financez des programmes locaux de gardiens rémunérés pour protéger les nids et soutenez la restauration des zones humides.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The gharial is a slender-snouted fish-eating crocodilian unique to the Indian subcontinent, distinguished by the distinctive bulbous growth on the male's snout.
endangerment: Hunting, egg collection, river damming, sand mining, and pollution have reduced a once-widespread species to a tiny fraction of its former range.
ecosystemNeeds: Deep, fast-flowing channels of large rivers — primarily the Chambal, Girwa, and Gandak — with clean water, sandy banks for nesting, and abundant fish.
actions: Support Chambal River protected area management, back nest protection and gharial head-starting programmes, and advocate against sand mining in key rivers.

en.description: The gharial is a slender-snouted fish-eating crocodilian unique to the Indian subcontinent, distinguished by the distinctive bulbous growth on the male's snout.
en.endangerment: Hunting, egg collection, river damming, sand mining, and pollution have reduced a once-widespread species to a tiny fraction of its former range.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Deep, fast-flowing channels of large rivers — primarily the Chambal, Girwa, and Gandak — with clean water, sandy banks for nesting, and abundant fish.
en.actions: Support Chambal River protected area management, back nest protection and gharial head-starting programmes, and advocate against sand mining in key rivers.

es.description: El gavial es un cocodrilo piscívoro de hocico estrecho único del subcontinente indio, distinguido por el crecimiento bulboso en el hocico del macho.
es.endangerment: La caza, la recolección de huevos, la construcción de presas en ríos, la extracción de arena y la contaminación han reducido una especie antaño extendida a una fracción de su rango anterior.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Canales profundos y de flujo rápido de grandes ríos —principalmente el Chambal, Girwa y Gandak— con agua limpia, orillas arenosas para anidar y abundante pesca.
es.actions: Apoya la gestión del área protegida del río Chambal, respalda la protección de nidos y los programas de cría en cautividad, y aboga contra la minería de arena en ríos clave.

pt.description: O gavial é um crocodiliano piscívoro de focinho fino único do subcontinente indiano, distinguido pelo crescimento bulboso no focinho do macho.
pt.endangerment: A caça, a coleta de ovos, a construção de barragens em rios, a mineração de areia e a poluição reduziram uma espécie outrora amplamente distribuída a uma fração de sua antiga área de ocorrência.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Canais profundos e de fluxo rápido de grandes rios — principalmente o Chambal, Girwa e Gandak — com água limpa, margens arenosas para nidificação e peixes abundantes.
pt.actions: Apoie a gestão da área protegida do Rio Chambal, respalda a proteção de ninhos e os programas de criação em cativeiro, e defenda contra a mineração de areia nos rios principais.

fr.description: Le gavial est un crocodilien piscivore au museau effilé, unique au sous-continent indien, distingué par la protubérance bulbeuse sur le museau du mâle.
fr.endangerment: La chasse, la collecte d'œufs, la construction de barrages, l'extraction de sable et la pollution ont réduit cette espèce autrefois répandue à une infime fraction de son aire d'origine.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des chenaux profonds et rapides des grands fleuves — principalement le Chambal, le Girwa et le Gandak — avec une eau propre, des berges sablonneuses pour la nidification et une abondance de poissons.
fr.actions: Soutenez la gestion de la zone protégée du fleuve Chambal, encouragez la protection des nids et les programmes d'élevage en captivité, et luttez contre l'extraction de sable dans les rivières clés.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The European eel is a remarkable fish that lives in freshwater rivers across Europe before making an epic migration to the Sargasso Sea to spawn and die.
endangerment: Its population has declined by over 90% since the 1980s due to barriers blocking river migration, overfishing, parasites, pollution, and climate-driven changes to ocean currents.
ecosystemNeeds: Connected river systems from coastal estuaries to inland freshwater habitats, plus access to the Sargasso Sea for spawning — unimpeded by dams or barriers.
actions: Advocate for fish passages on European dams, support eel restocking programmes, reduce eel consumption, and back EU eel management plans.

en.description: The European eel is a remarkable fish that lives in freshwater rivers across Europe before making an epic migration to the Sargasso Sea to spawn and die.
en.endangerment: Its population has declined by over 90% since the 1980s due to barriers blocking river migration, overfishing, parasites, pollution, and climate-driven changes to ocean currents.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Connected river systems from coastal estuaries to inland freshwater habitats, plus access to the Sargasso Sea for spawning — unimpeded by dams or barriers.
en.actions: Advocate for fish passages on European dams, support eel restocking programmes, reduce eel consumption, and back EU eel management plans.

es.description: La anguila europea es un pez notable que vive en ríos de agua dulce de toda Europa antes de realizar una épica migración al Mar de los Sargazos para reproducirse y morir.
es.endangerment: Su población ha disminuido más del 90% desde la década de 1980 debido a barreras que bloquean la migración fluvial, la sobrepesca, los parásitos, la contaminación y los cambios oceánicos por el clima.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Sistemas fluviales conectados desde estuarios costeros hasta hábitats de agua dulce, más acceso al Mar de los Sargazos para la reproducción, sin obstrucciones por presas.
es.actions: Aboga por pasos de peces en presas europeas, apoya programas de repoblación de anguilas, reduce el consumo de anguila y respalda los planes de gestión de anguilas de la UE.

pt.description: A enguia-europeia é um peixe notável que vive em rios de água doce por toda a Europa antes de realizar uma épica migração para o Mar dos Sargaços para se reproduzir e morrer.
pt.endangerment: Sua população diminuiu mais de 90% desde a década de 1980 devido a barreiras que bloqueiam a migração fluvial, sobrepesca, parasitas, poluição e mudanças oceânicas climáticas.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Sistemas fluviais conectados desde estuários costeiros até habitats de água doce, mais acesso ao Mar dos Sargaços para a reprodução, sem obstruções por barragens.
pt.actions: Defenda passagens de peixes em barragens europeias, apoie programas de repovoamento de enguias, reduza o consumo de enguia e respalda os planos de gestão de enguias da UE.

fr.description: L'anguille européenne est un poisson remarquable qui vit dans les rivières d'eau douce de toute l'Europe avant d'effectuer une épique migration vers la mer des Sargasses pour se reproduire et mourir.
fr.endangerment: Sa population a décliné de plus de 90% depuis les années 1980 en raison des obstacles bloquant les migrations fluviales, de la surpêche, des parasites, de la pollution et des changements océaniques liés au climat.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des systèmes fluviaux connectés des estuaires côtiers aux habitats d'eau douce intérieurs, plus l'accès à la mer des Sargasses pour la reproduction, sans obstacles liés aux barrages.
fr.actions: Plaidez pour des passes à poissons sur les barrages européens, soutenez les programmes de repeuplement en anguilles, réduisez la consommation d'anguilles et appuyez les plans de gestion des anguilles de l'UE.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The Devil's Hole pupfish lives in one of the most extreme habitats on Earth — a single geothermal pool in a limestone cavern in the Nevada desert.
endangerment: With the entire global wild population confined to one tiny rock shelf, any single disturbance — an earthquake, groundwater pumping, or pollution — could cause instant extinction.
ecosystemNeeds: A single 3.5 × 6-metre geothermal pool in Devil's Hole, Nevada, with year-round stable temperature, a specific algae-covered rock shelf, and no contaminants.
actions: Support Mojave Desert groundwater protection, back the US Fish & Wildlife Service's captive backup population, and fund seismic monitoring research around the site.

en.description: The Devil's Hole pupfish lives in one of the most extreme habitats on Earth — a single geothermal pool in a limestone cavern in the Nevada desert.
en.endangerment: With the entire global wild population confined to one tiny rock shelf, any single disturbance — an earthquake, groundwater pumping, or pollution — could cause instant extinction.
en.ecosystemNeeds: A single 3.5 × 6-metre geothermal pool in Devil's Hole, Nevada, with year-round stable temperature, a specific algae-covered rock shelf, and no contaminants.
en.actions: Support Mojave Desert groundwater protection, back the US Fish & Wildlife Service's captive backup population, and fund seismic monitoring research around the site.

es.description: El pez cachorro del Agujero del Diablo vive en uno de los hábitats más extremos de la Tierra: una sola piscina geotérmica en una caverna caliza en el desierto de Nevada.
es.endangerment: Con toda la población silvestre mundial confinada a una pequeña repisa de roca, cualquier perturbación —un terremoto, el bombeo de aguas subterráneas o la contaminación— podría causar la extinción instantánea.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Una sola piscina geotérmica de 3,5 × 6 metros en Devil's Hole, Nevada, con temperatura estable durante todo el año, una repisa de roca específica cubierta de algas y sin contaminantes.
es.actions: Apoya la protección de las aguas subterráneas del desierto de Mojave, respalda la población de respaldo en cautividad del Servicio de Pesca y Vida Silvestre de EE. UU. y financia la investigación de monitoreo sísmico alrededor del lugar.

pt.description: O peixe-cachorro-do-buraco-do-diabo vive em um dos habitats mais extremos da Terra — uma única piscina geotérmica em uma caverna calcária no deserto de Nevada.
pt.endangerment: Com toda a população selvagem mundial confinada a uma pequena plataforma de rocha, qualquer perturbação — um terremoto, bombeamento de águas subterrâneas ou poluição — poderia causar extinção instantânea.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Uma única piscina geotérmica de 3,5 × 6 metros no Devil's Hole, Nevada, com temperatura estável ao longo do ano, uma plataforma de rocha específica coberta de algas e sem contaminantes.
pt.actions: Apoie a proteção das águas subterrâneas do Deserto de Mojave, respalda a população de reserva em cativeiro do Serviço de Pesca e Vida Selvagem dos EUA e finance pesquisas de monitoramento sísmico ao redor do local.

fr.description: Le cyprinodonte du Devil's Hole vit dans l'un des habitats les plus extrêmes de la Terre — un seul bassin géothermique dans une caverne calcaire dans le désert du Nevada.
fr.endangerment: Avec toute la population sauvage mondiale confinée à un petit rebord rocheux, toute perturbation — un tremblement de terre, le pompage des eaux souterraines ou la pollution — pourrait provoquer une extinction instantanée.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Un seul bassin géothermique de 3,5 × 6 mètres au Devil's Hole, Nevada, avec une température stable tout au long de l'année, un rebord rocheux spécifique recouvert d'algues et sans contaminants.
fr.actions: Soutenez la protection des eaux souterraines du désert de Mojave, appuyez la population de sauvegarde en captivité du US Fish & Wildlife Service et financez la recherche de surveillance sismique autour du site.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The Mekong giant catfish is one of the world's largest freshwater fish, reaching up to 3 metres and 300 kg, and is endemic to the Mekong River basin.
endangerment: Overfishing, dam construction blocking migratory routes, and habitat destruction along the Mekong have caused a drastic population decline over the past few decades.
ecosystemNeeds: The main channel and deep pools of the Mekong River, with free passage across international borders for long-distance migration to spawning grounds.
actions: Support moratoriums on Mekong catfish fishing, back international dam-impact assessments, and advocate for fish-passage infrastructure on planned Mekong dams.

en.description: The Mekong giant catfish is one of the world's largest freshwater fish, reaching up to 3 metres and 300 kg, and is endemic to the Mekong River basin.
en.endangerment: Overfishing, dam construction blocking migratory routes, and habitat destruction along the Mekong have caused a drastic population decline over the past few decades.
en.ecosystemNeeds: The main channel and deep pools of the Mekong River, with free passage across international borders for long-distance migration to spawning grounds.
en.actions: Support moratoriums on Mekong catfish fishing, back international dam-impact assessments, and advocate for fish-passage infrastructure on planned Mekong dams.

es.description: El pez gato gigante del Mekong es uno de los peces de agua dulce más grandes del mundo, alcanzando hasta 3 metros y 300 kg, y es endémico de la cuenca del río Mekong.
es.endangerment: La sobrepesca, la construcción de presas que bloquean las rutas migratorias y la destrucción del hábitat a lo largo del Mekong han causado un drástico declive poblacional en las últimas décadas.
es.ecosystemNeeds: El canal principal y las pozas profundas del río Mekong, con libre paso a través de fronteras internacionales para la migración de larga distancia a los terrenos de desove.
es.actions: Apoya las moratorias sobre la pesca de bagre del Mekong, respalda las evaluaciones internacionales del impacto de las presas y aboga por infraestructura de paso de peces en las presas planeadas del Mekong.

pt.description: O peixe-gato-gigante-do-mekong é um dos maiores peixes de água doce do mundo, atingindo até 3 metros e 300 kg, e é endêmico da bacia do Rio Mekong.
pt.endangerment: A sobrepesca, a construção de barragens bloqueando rotas migratórias e a destruição do habitat ao longo do Mekong causaram um drástico declínio populacional nas últimas décadas.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: O canal principal e as poças profundas do Rio Mekong, com livre passagem através de fronteiras internacionais para a migração de longa distância aos locais de desova.
pt.actions: Apoie moratórias sobre a pesca de bagre do Mekong, respalda avaliações internacionais do impacto de barragens e defenda infraestrutura de passagem de peixes nas barragens planejadas do Mekong.

fr.description: Le poisson-chat géant du Mékong est l'un des plus grands poissons d'eau douce au monde, atteignant jusqu'à 3 mètres et 300 kg, endémique du bassin du fleuve Mékong.
fr.endangerment: La surpêche, la construction de barrages bloquant les routes migratoires et la destruction de l'habitat le long du Mékong ont provoqué un déclin drastique de la population au cours des dernières décennies.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Le chenal principal et les fosses profondes du fleuve Mékong, avec libre passage à travers les frontières internationales pour la migration longue distance vers les frayères.
fr.actions: Soutenez les moratoires sur la pêche au silure du Mékong, appuyez les évaluations internationales de l'impact des barrages et plaidez pour des infrastructures de passes à poissons sur les barrages planifiés du Mékong.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The Wollemi pine is a 'living fossil' conifer discovered only in 1994 in a remote sandstone gorge in the Blue Mountains west of Sydney, Australia.
endangerment: The entire wild population consists of fewer than 100 adult trees in a single secret gorge. Wildfire and introduced root disease are existential threats.
ecosystemNeeds: Sheltered, moist sandstone gorges in the Blue Mountains with temperate rainforest conditions, protection from fire, and freedom from fungal pathogens.
actions: Support the NSW National Parks fire management plan for the Blue Mountains, buy legally propagated Wollemi pines from nurseries (which funds conservation), and prevent disease introduction.

en.description: The Wollemi pine is a 'living fossil' conifer discovered only in 1994 in a remote sandstone gorge in the Blue Mountains west of Sydney, Australia.
en.endangerment: The entire wild population consists of fewer than 100 adult trees in a single secret gorge. Wildfire and introduced root disease are existential threats.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Sheltered, moist sandstone gorges in the Blue Mountains with temperate rainforest conditions, protection from fire, and freedom from fungal pathogens.
en.actions: Support the NSW National Parks fire management plan for the Blue Mountains, buy legally propagated Wollemi pines from nurseries (which funds conservation), and prevent disease introduction.

es.description: El pino Wollemi es un conífero 'fósil viviente' descubierto solo en 1994 en una remota garganta de arenisca en las Montañas Azules al oeste de Sídney, Australia.
es.endangerment: La población silvestre completa consiste en menos de 100 árboles adultos en una única garganta secreta. Los incendios forestales y las enfermedades de raíces introducidas son amenazas existenciales.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Gargantas de arenisca protegidas y húmedas en las Montañas Azules con condiciones de bosque lluvioso templado, protección contra incendios y libre de patógenos fúngicos.
es.actions: Apoya el plan de manejo de incendios del Parque Nacional NSW para las Montañas Azules, compra pinos Wollemi legalmente propagados de viveros (lo que financia la conservación) y previene la introducción de enfermedades.

pt.description: O pinheiro-wollemi é um conífero 'fóssil vivo' descoberto apenas em 1994 em um remoto desfiladeiro de arenito nas Montanhas Azuis a oeste de Sydney, Austrália.
pt.endangerment: Toda a população selvagem consiste em menos de 100 árvores adultas em um único desfiladeiro secreto. Incêndios florestais e doenças de raízes introduzidas são ameaças existenciais.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Desfiladeiros de arenito abrigados e úmidos nas Montanhas Azuis com condições de floresta temperada úmida, proteção contra incêndios e livre de patógenos fúngicos.
pt.actions: Apoie o plano de manejo de incêndios do Parque Nacional NSW para as Montanhas Azuis, compre pinheiros-wollemi legalmente propagados de viveiros (o que financia a conservação) e previna a introdução de doenças.

fr.description: Le pin Wollemi est un conifère 'fossile vivant' découvert seulement en 1994 dans une gorge de grès isolée des Montagnes Bleues à l'ouest de Sydney, en Australie.
fr.endangerment: L'ensemble de la population sauvage est constitué de moins de 100 arbres adultes dans une seule gorge secrète. Les feux de brousse et les maladies des racines introduites constituent des menaces existentielles.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des gorges de grès abritées et humides dans les Montagnes Bleues avec des conditions de forêt pluviale tempérée, une protection contre les incendies et une absence de pathogènes fongiques.
fr.actions: Soutenez le plan de gestion des incendies du NSW National Parks pour les Montagnes Bleues, achetez des pins Wollemi légalement propagés en pépinières (ce qui finance la conservation) et prévenez l'introduction de maladies.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The dragon's blood tree is a striking umbrella-shaped tree endemic to Socotra Island, Yemen, producing a vivid red resin that gives it its name.
endangerment: Climate change is altering the monsoon patterns that the trees depend on for moisture. Overgrazing by goats and development are also damaging habitat.
ecosystemNeeds: Rocky, arid limestone plateaus on Socotra Island with seasonal mist and fog providing crucial moisture in an otherwise dry environment.
actions: Support UNESCO Socotra Biosphere Reserve protection, advocate against unregulated tourism development, and back climate adaptation funding for Socotra.

en.description: The dragon's blood tree is a striking umbrella-shaped tree endemic to Socotra Island, Yemen, producing a vivid red resin that gives it its name.
en.endangerment: Climate change is altering the monsoon patterns that the trees depend on for moisture. Overgrazing by goats and development are also damaging habitat.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Rocky, arid limestone plateaus on Socotra Island with seasonal mist and fog providing crucial moisture in an otherwise dry environment.
en.actions: Support UNESCO Socotra Biosphere Reserve protection, advocate against unregulated tourism development, and back climate adaptation funding for Socotra.

es.description: El árbol de sangre de dragón es un llamativo árbol en forma de paraguas endémico de la isla de Socotra en Yemen, que produce una vívida resina roja que le da su nombre.
es.endangerment: El cambio climático está alterando los patrones monzónicos de los que dependen los árboles para la humedad. El sobrepastoreo por cabras y el desarrollo también están dañando el hábitat.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Mesetas calcáreas rocosas y áridas en la isla de Socotra con niebla y bruma estacional que proporcionan humedad crucial en un entorno por lo demás seco.
es.actions: Apoya la protección de la Reserva de la Biosfera de la UNESCO en Socotra, aboga contra el desarrollo turístico no regulado y respalda la financiación de adaptación climática para Socotra.

pt.description: A árvore-sangue-de-dragão é uma marcante árvore em forma de guarda-chuva endêmica da ilha de Socotra no Iêmen, produzindo uma vívida resina vermelha que lhe dá o nome.
pt.endangerment: A mudança climática está alterando os padrões de monção dos quais as árvores dependem para a umidade. O superpastoreio por cabras e o desenvolvimento também estão danificando o habitat.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Planaltos calcários rochosos e áridos na ilha de Socotra com neblina sazonal e névoa que fornecem umidade crucial em um ambiente de outra forma seco.
pt.actions: Apoie a proteção da Reserva da Biosfera da UNESCO em Socotra, defenda contra o desenvolvimento turístico não regulamentado e respalda o financiamento de adaptação climática para Socotra.

fr.description: Le dragonnier de Socotra est un arbre frappant en forme de parapluie endémique de l'île de Socotra au Yémen, produisant une résine rouge vive qui lui a donné son nom.
fr.endangerment: Le changement climatique modifie les régimes de mousson dont dépendent les arbres pour l'humidité. Le surpâturage des chèvres et le développement endommagent également l'habitat.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des plateaux calcaires rocheux et arides sur l'île de Socotra, avec des brumes et des brouillards saisonniers qui fournissent l'humidité cruciale dans un environnement par ailleurs sec.
fr.actions: Soutenez la protection de la Réserve de biosphère UNESCO de Socotra, luttez contre le développement touristique non réglementé et appuyez le financement de l'adaptation climatique pour Socotra.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The coco de mer produces the world's largest seed — a double coconut that can weigh up to 25 kg — and is found naturally only in Seychelles.
endangerment: Its natural range is now just two islands (Praslin and Curieuse), restricted by human land clearance. Illegal harvest of nuts for their high black-market value continues.
ecosystemNeeds: Moist tropical forest on granite islands in the Seychelles, particularly the Vallée de Mai UNESCO World Heritage Site on Praslin.
actions: Support the Seychelles Islands Foundation's Vallée de Mai management, back anti-poaching of nuts, and never buy illegally sourced coco de mer products.

en.description: The coco de mer produces the world's largest seed — a double coconut that can weigh up to 25 kg — and is found naturally only in Seychelles.
en.endangerment: Its natural range is now just two islands (Praslin and Curieuse), restricted by human land clearance. Illegal harvest of nuts for their high black-market value continues.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Moist tropical forest on granite islands in the Seychelles, particularly the Vallée de Mai UNESCO World Heritage Site on Praslin.
en.actions: Support the Seychelles Islands Foundation's Vallée de Mai management, back anti-poaching of nuts, and never buy illegally sourced coco de mer products.

es.description: El coco de mer produce la semilla más grande del mundo —un doble coco que puede pesar hasta 25 kg— y se encuentra naturalmente solo en las Seychelles.
es.endangerment: Su rango natural es ahora solo dos islas (Praslin y Curieuse), restringido por el desmonte humano. La cosecha ilegal de nueces por su alto valor en el mercado negro continúa.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque tropical húmedo en islas graníticas de las Seychelles, especialmente el sitio del Patrimonio Mundial de la UNESCO Vallée de Mai en Praslin.
es.actions: Apoya la gestión de Vallée de Mai de la Fundación Islas Seychelles, respalda la lucha contra la caza furtiva de nueces y nunca compres productos de coco de mer obtenidos ilegalmente.

pt.description: O coco-do-mar produz a maior semente do mundo — um coco duplo que pode pesar até 25 kg — e é encontrado naturalmente apenas nas Seychelles.
pt.endangerment: Sua área de distribuição natural é agora apenas duas ilhas (Praslin e Curieuse), restrita pela derrubada humana. A colheita ilegal de nozes pelo seu alto valor no mercado negro continua.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta tropical úmida em ilhas graníticas das Seychelles, especialmente o sítio do Patrimônio Mundial da UNESCO Vallée de Mai em Praslin.
pt.actions: Apoie a gestão do Vallée de Mai da Fundação Ilhas Seychelles, respalda a luta contra o braconagem de nozes e nunca compre produtos de coco-do-mar obtidos ilegalmente.

fr.description: Le coco de mer produit la plus grande graine du monde — une noix de coco double pouvant peser jusqu'à 25 kg — et ne se trouve naturellement qu'aux Seychelles.
fr.endangerment: Son aire de répartition naturelle se limite maintenant à deux îles (Praslin et Curieuse), restreinte par le défrichement humain. La récolte illégale de noix pour leur valeur élevée sur le marché noir continue.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt tropicale humide sur les îles granitiques des Seychelles, notamment la Vallée de Mai, site du patrimoine mondial de l'UNESCO, sur Praslin.
fr.actions: Soutenez la gestion de la Vallée de Mai par la Seychelles Islands Foundation, combattez le braconnage des noix et n'achetez jamais de produits coco de mer obtenus illégalement.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The freshwater pearl mussel is one of Europe's longest-lived animals, capable of living up to 130 years, and was once found across clean rivers from the Arctic to Spain.
endangerment: Water pollution from agriculture, fine sedimentation of gravel beds, and the loss of juvenile host fish have caused population crashes across most of its range.
ecosystemNeeds: Clean, nutrient-poor, fast-flowing rivers with gravel or sandy beds and healthy populations of salmonid fish, which the mussel larvae parasitise briefly in early life.
actions: Support riparian buffer-strip planting, back river restoration and sedimentation control projects, and advocate for stricter agricultural runoff regulation.

en.description: The freshwater pearl mussel is one of Europe's longest-lived animals, capable of living up to 130 years, and was once found across clean rivers from the Arctic to Spain.
en.endangerment: Water pollution from agriculture, fine sedimentation of gravel beds, and the loss of juvenile host fish have caused population crashes across most of its range.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Clean, nutrient-poor, fast-flowing rivers with gravel or sandy beds and healthy populations of salmonid fish, which the mussel larvae parasitise briefly in early life.
en.actions: Support riparian buffer-strip planting, back river restoration and sedimentation control projects, and advocate for stricter agricultural runoff regulation.

es.description: El mejillón de río perlífero es uno de los animales de vida más larga de Europa, capaz de vivir hasta 130 años, y alguna vez se encontró en ríos limpios desde el Ártico hasta España.
es.endangerment: La contaminación del agua por la agricultura, la sedimentación fina de los lechos de grava y la pérdida de peces hospedadores juveniles han causado colapsos poblacionales en la mayor parte de su rango.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Ríos limpios, pobres en nutrientes y de flujo rápido con lechos de grava o arena y poblaciones saludables de peces salmónidos, en los que las larvas del mejillón parasitan brevemente en la vida temprana.
es.actions: Apoya la plantación de franjas de amortiguamiento ribereño, respalda proyectos de restauración de ríos y control de sedimentación, y aboga por una regulación más estricta de la escorrentía agrícola.

pt.description: O mexilhão-de-rio-perlífero é um dos animais de vida mais longa da Europa, capaz de viver até 130 anos, e já foi encontrado em rios limpos do Ártico à Espanha.
pt.endangerment: A poluição da água pela agricultura, a sedimentação fina dos leitos de cascalho e a perda de peixes hospedeiros juvenis causaram colapsos populacionais na maior parte de sua área de distribuição.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Rios limpos, pobres em nutrientes e de fluxo rápido com leitos de cascalho ou areia e populações saudáveis de peixes salmonídeos, nos quais as larvas do mexilhão parasitam brevemente no início da vida.
pt.actions: Apoie o plantio de faixas de amortecimento ribeirinho, respalda projetos de restauração de rios e controle de sedimentação, e defenda uma regulamentação mais rígida da escoamento agrícola.

fr.description: La moule perlière d'eau douce est l'un des animaux à la plus longue durée de vie en Europe, pouvant vivre jusqu'à 130 ans, et se trouvait autrefois dans des rivières propres de l'Arctique à l'Espagne.
fr.endangerment: La pollution de l'eau par l'agriculture, la sédimentation fine des lits de gravier et la perte des poissons hôtes juvéniles ont provoqué des effondrements de population sur la majeure partie de son aire de répartition.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des rivières propres, pauvres en nutriments et à débit rapide avec des lits de gravier ou de sable et des populations saines de poissons salmonidés, que les larves de moule parasitent brièvement en début de vie.
fr.actions: Soutenez la plantation de bandes tampons riveraines, appuyez les projets de restauration des rivières et de contrôle de la sédimentation, et plaidez pour une réglementation plus stricte des ruissellements agricoles.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: Schaus' swallowtail is a large, striking butterfly restricted to tropical hardwood hammock forests in the northern Florida Keys.
endangerment: Habitat loss through development, mosquito control spraying, and hurricane damage have all reduced its fragile remaining hammock habitat and population.
ecosystemNeeds: Intact tropical hardwood hammock forest in the Florida Keys, where host plants for larvae — particularly torchwood and wild lime — remain in sufficient abundance.
actions: Support Biscayne National Park and Key Largo hammock protection, back pesticide-free mosquito control alternatives, and fund captive breeding at butterfly centres.

en.description: Schaus' swallowtail is a large, striking butterfly restricted to tropical hardwood hammock forests in the northern Florida Keys.
en.endangerment: Habitat loss through development, mosquito control spraying, and hurricane damage have all reduced its fragile remaining hammock habitat and population.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Intact tropical hardwood hammock forest in the Florida Keys, where host plants for larvae — particularly torchwood and wild lime — remain in sufficient abundance.
en.actions: Support Biscayne National Park and Key Largo hammock protection, back pesticide-free mosquito control alternatives, and fund captive breeding at butterfly centres.

es.description: La mariposa cola de golondrina de Schaus es una mariposa grande y vistosa restringida a los bosques tropicales de madera dura en los cayos del norte de Florida.
es.endangerment: La pérdida de hábitat por desarrollo urbano, fumigaciones para control de mosquitos y daños por huracanes han reducido su frágil hábitat de hammock y su población.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque tropical de madera dura intacto en los Cayos de Florida, donde las plantas huésped para larvas —especialmente el palo de arco y la lima silvestre— permanezcan en abundancia suficiente.
es.actions: Apoyar la protección del Parque Nacional Biscayne y los hammocks de Key Largo, promover alternativas al control de mosquitos sin pesticidas y financiar la cría en cautiverio en centros para mariposas.

pt.description: A borboleta-rabo-de-andorinha-de-Schaus é uma borboleta grande e vistosa restrita às florestas tropicais de madeira-dura nos cayos do norte da Flórida.
pt.endangerment: A perda de habitat por desenvolvimento urbano, pulverizações de controle de mosquitos e danos causados por furacões reduziram seu frágil habitat de hammock e a população.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta tropical de madeira-dura intacta nos Cayos da Flórida, onde as plantas hospedeiras para larvas — especialmente o pau-de-arco e a limeira silvestre — permaneçam em abundância suficiente.
pt.actions: Apoiar a proteção do Parque Nacional Biscayne e os hammocks de Key Largo, promover alternativas livres de pesticidas para o controle de mosquitos e financiar a criação em cativeiro em centros para borboletas.

fr.description: Le papillon porte-queue de Schaus est un grand et magnifique papillon confiné aux forêts tropicales de bois dur dans le nord des Keys de Floride.
fr.endangerment: La perte d'habitat due à l'urbanisation, les pulvérisations de pesticides pour le contrôle des moustiques et les dégâts causés par les ouragans ont réduit son fragile habitat de hammock et sa population.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt tropicale de bois dur intacte dans les Keys de Floride, où les plantes hôtes pour les larves — notamment le bois de torche et le citronnier sauvage — restent suffisamment abondantes.
fr.actions: Soutenir la protection du parc national de Biscayne et des hammocks de Key Largo, promouvoir des alternatives sans pesticides pour le contrôle des moustiques et financer l'élevage en captivité dans des centres spécialisés.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: Partula snails are tiny tree snails from the islands of French Polynesia that became a symbol of the devastation invasive species can cause.
endangerment: The introduction of the rosy wolf snail as a biocontrol agent in the 1970s backfired catastrophically — the predatory snail wiped out most Partula species within decades.
ecosystemNeeds: Humid mountain forest on Pacific islands with native vegetation providing food and shelter in the understorey and on tree trunks.
actions: Support the international zoo-based Partula captive breeding and reintroduction network, back invasive species control on Pacific islands, and fund Pacific island habitat restoration.

en.description: Partula snails are tiny tree snails from the islands of French Polynesia that became a symbol of the devastation invasive species can cause.
en.endangerment: The introduction of the rosy wolf snail as a biocontrol agent in the 1970s backfired catastrophically — the predatory snail wiped out most Partula species within decades.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Humid mountain forest on Pacific islands with native vegetation providing food and shelter in the understorey and on tree trunks.
en.actions: Support the international zoo-based Partula captive breeding and reintroduction network, back invasive species control on Pacific islands, and fund Pacific island habitat restoration.

es.description: Los caracoles Partula son pequeños caracoles de árbol de las islas de la Polinesia Francesa que se convirtieron en símbolo de la devastación que pueden causar las especies invasoras.
es.endangerment: La introducción del caracol lobo rosado como agente de biocontrol en la década de 1970 fracasó catastróficamente —el caracol depredador eliminó a la mayoría de las especies Partula en cuestión de décadas.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque de montaña húmedo en islas del Pacífico con vegetación nativa que proporciona alimento y refugio en el sotobosque y en los troncos de los árboles.
es.actions: Apoya la red internacional de cría en cautividad y reintroducción de Partula en zoológicos, respalda el control de especies invasoras en las islas del Pacífico y financia la restauración del hábitat de las islas del Pacífico.

pt.description: Os caracóis Partula são pequenos caracóis de árvore das ilhas da Polinésia Francesa que se tornaram símbolo da devastação que as espécies invasoras podem causar.
pt.endangerment: A introdução do caracol-lobo-rosado como agente de biocontrole na década de 1970 fracassou catastroficamente — o caracol predador eliminou a maioria das espécies de Partula em poucas décadas.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta de montanha úmida em ilhas do Pacífico com vegetação nativa que fornece alimento e abrigo no sub-bosque e nos troncos das árvores.
pt.actions: Apoie a rede internacional de criação em cativeiro e reintrodução de Partula em zoológicos, respalda o controle de espécies invasoras nas ilhas do Pacífico e finance a restauração do habitat das ilhas do Pacífico.

fr.description: Les escargots Partula sont de petits escargots arboricoles des îles de Polynésie française qui sont devenus un symbole de la dévastation que peuvent causer les espèces envahissantes.
fr.endangerment: L'introduction de l'escargot loup rose comme agent de biocontrôle dans les années 1970 a eu des effets catastrophiques — l'escargot prédateur a éliminé la plupart des espèces Partula en quelques décennies.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt de montagne humide sur les îles du Pacifique avec une végétation indigène fournissant nourriture et abri dans le sous-étage et sur les troncs d'arbres.
fr.actions: Soutenez le réseau international de reproduction en captivité et de réintroduction des Partula dans les zoos, appuyez le contrôle des espèces envahissantes sur les îles du Pacifique et financez la restauration de l'habitat insulaire du Pacifique.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The saiga antelope is a prehistoric-looking steppe animal with a distinctive bulbous nose, adapted to filter dust and warm cold air on the vast grasslands of Central Asia.
endangerment: Mass die-offs linked to unusual weather events have killed hundreds of thousands at a time. Poaching for horns used in traditional medicine has also devastated populations.
ecosystemNeeds: Open semi-arid steppes and grasslands in Kazakhstan, Russia, and Mongolia, with unobstructed migration routes between seasonal pastures.
actions: Support Kazakhstan's anti-poaching programmes, back CITES listing upgrades, and fund epidemiological research into the mass die-off disease mechanism.

en.description: The saiga antelope is a prehistoric-looking steppe animal with a distinctive bulbous nose, adapted to filter dust and warm cold air on the vast grasslands of Central Asia.
en.endangerment: Mass die-offs linked to unusual weather events have killed hundreds of thousands at a time. Poaching for horns used in traditional medicine has also devastated populations.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Open semi-arid steppes and grasslands in Kazakhstan, Russia, and Mongolia, with unobstructed migration routes between seasonal pastures.
en.actions: Support Kazakhstan's anti-poaching programmes, back CITES listing upgrades, and fund epidemiological research into the mass die-off disease mechanism.

es.description: La saiga es un animal de estepa de aspecto prehistórico con una nariz bulbosa característica, adaptada para filtrar el polvo y calentar el aire frío en las vastas praderas de Asia Central.
es.endangerment: Las muertes masivas vinculadas a eventos climáticos inusuales han matado a cientos de miles a la vez. La caza furtiva por cuernos utilizados en medicina tradicional también ha devastado las poblaciones.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Estepas y praderas semiáridas abiertas en Kazajistán, Rusia y Mongolia, con rutas de migración sin obstáculos entre pastos estacionales.
es.actions: Apoya los programas anticontrabando de Kazajistán, respalda las actualizaciones de la lista de la CITES y financia investigaciones epidemiológicas sobre el mecanismo de las muertes masivas.

pt.description: A saiga é um animal de estepe de aparência pré-histórica com um nariz bulboso característico, adaptado para filtrar poeira e aquecer o ar frio nas vastas pradarias da Ásia Central.
pt.endangerment: Mortes em massa ligadas a eventos climáticos incomuns mataram centenas de milhares de uma vez. O braconagem por chifres usados em medicina tradicional também devastou as populações.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Estepes e pradarias semiáridas abertas no Cazaquistão, Rússia e Mongólia, com rotas de migração desobstruídas entre pastagens sazonais.
pt.actions: Apoie os programas anticontrabando do Cazaquistão, respalda as atualizações da lista CITES e finance pesquisas epidemiológicas sobre o mecanismo das mortes em massa.

fr.description: La saïga est un animal de steppe d'apparence préhistorique avec un nez bulbeux caractéristique, adapté pour filtrer la poussière et réchauffer l'air froid dans les vastes prairies d'Asie centrale.
fr.endangerment: Des mortalités massives liées à des événements météorologiques inhabituels ont tué des centaines de milliers d'individus à la fois. Le braconnage pour les cornes utilisées en médecine traditionnelle a également dévasté les populations.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des steppes et prairies semi-arides ouvertes au Kazakhstan, en Russie et en Mongolie, avec des routes migratoires dégagées entre les pâturages saisonniers.
fr.actions: Soutenez les programmes antibraconnage du Kazakhstan, appuyez les révisions à la hausse des listes CITES et financez la recherche épidémiologique sur le mécanisme des mortalités massives.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The Irrawaddy dolphin is a round-headed freshwater dolphin found in rivers and coastal waters across Southeast Asia, including the Mekong and Irrawaddy.
endangerment: Drowning in gillnets, blast fishing, habitat degradation from dam construction, and boat traffic have severely reduced the Mekong subpopulation.
ecosystemNeeds: Deep freshwater pools in large rivers like the Mekong and Irrawaddy, with sufficient fish prey and minimal net entanglement risk.
actions: Support Cambodia's Mekong protected zone for Irrawaddy dolphins, advocate for gillnet-free dolphin conservation areas, and fund local community warden schemes.

en.description: The Irrawaddy dolphin is a round-headed freshwater dolphin found in rivers and coastal waters across Southeast Asia, including the Mekong and Irrawaddy.
en.endangerment: Drowning in gillnets, blast fishing, habitat degradation from dam construction, and boat traffic have severely reduced the Mekong subpopulation.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Deep freshwater pools in large rivers like the Mekong and Irrawaddy, with sufficient fish prey and minimal net entanglement risk.
en.actions: Support Cambodia's Mekong protected zone for Irrawaddy dolphins, advocate for gillnet-free dolphin conservation areas, and fund local community warden schemes.

es.description: El delfín de Irrawaddy es un delfín de cabeza redonda de agua dulce que se encuentra en ríos y aguas costeras del sureste asiático, incluidos el Mekong y el Irrawaddy.
es.endangerment: El ahogamiento en redes de enmalle, la pesca con explosivos, la degradación del hábitat por la construcción de presas y el tráfico de embarcaciones han reducido gravemente la subpoblación del Mekong.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Pozas de agua dulce profundas en grandes ríos como el Mekong y el Irrawaddy, con suficientes presas de peces y riesgo mínimo de enredamiento en redes.
es.actions: Apoya la zona protegida del Mekong de Camboya para los delfines de Irrawaddy, aboga por áreas de conservación de delfines libres de redes de enmalle y financia esquemas locales de vigilancia comunitaria.

pt.description: O boto-de-irrawaddy é um boto de cabeça arredondada de água doce encontrado em rios e águas costeiras do Sudeste Asiático, incluindo o Mekong e o Irrawaddy.
pt.endangerment: O afogamento em redes de emalhe, a pesca com explosivos, a degradação do habitat pela construção de barragens e o tráfego de embarcações reduziram gravemente a subpopulação do Mekong.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Poças de água doce profundas em grandes rios como o Mekong e o Irrawaddy, com presas de peixes suficientes e risco mínimo de enredamento em redes.
pt.actions: Apoie a zona protegida do Mekong do Camboja para os botos-de-irrawaddy, defenda áreas de conservação de botos livres de redes de emalhe e finance esquemas locais de vigilância comunitária.

fr.description: Le dauphin de l'Irrawaddy est un dauphin d'eau douce à tête ronde trouvé dans les rivières et eaux côtières d'Asie du Sud-Est, dont le Mékong et l'Irrawaddy.
fr.endangerment: La noyade dans les filets maillants, la pêche à l'explosif, la dégradation de l'habitat due à la construction de barrages et le trafic fluvial ont sévèrement réduit la sous-population du Mékong.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des fosses d'eau douce profondes dans les grands fleuves comme le Mékong et l'Irrawaddy, avec des proies piscicoles suffisantes et un risque minimal d'enchevêtrement dans les filets.
fr.actions: Soutenez la zone protégée du Mékong au Cambodge pour les dauphins de l'Irrawaddy, plaidez pour des zones de conservation des dauphins sans filets maillants et financez des programmes de surveillance communautaire locale.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The Tapanuli orangutan is the most recently described great ape species, discovered in 2017, and lives in a small patch of highland forest in North Sumatra.
endangerment: Its entire range covers only a few hundred square kilometres and is under pressure from a proposed hydroelectric dam, agricultural encroachment, and illegal hunting.
ecosystemNeeds: Intact montane and submontane tropical forest in the Batang Toru ecosystem, Sumatra, free from large-scale infrastructure development.
actions: Oppose infrastructure projects that fragment the Batang Toru forest, support great ape protection legislation in Indonesia, and fund habitat connectivity surveys.

en.description: The Tapanuli orangutan is the most recently described great ape species, discovered in 2017, and lives in a small patch of highland forest in North Sumatra.
en.endangerment: Its entire range covers only a few hundred square kilometres and is under pressure from a proposed hydroelectric dam, agricultural encroachment, and illegal hunting.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Intact montane and submontane tropical forest in the Batang Toru ecosystem, Sumatra, free from large-scale infrastructure development.
en.actions: Oppose infrastructure projects that fragment the Batang Toru forest, support great ape protection legislation in Indonesia, and fund habitat connectivity surveys.

es.description: El orangután de Tapanuli es la especie de gran simio descubierta más recientemente, identificada en 2017, y vive en un pequeño parche de bosque de montaña en el norte de Sumatra.
es.endangerment: Su rango completo cubre solo unos pocos cientos de kilómetros cuadrados y está bajo presión de una presa hidroeléctrica propuesta, la invasión agrícola y la caza ilegal.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque tropical montano y submontano intacto en el ecosistema Batang Toru, Sumatra, libre del desarrollo de infraestructura a gran escala.
es.actions: Oponte a los proyectos de infraestructura que fragmenten el bosque Batang Toru, apoya la legislación de protección de grandes simios en Indonesia y financia estudios de conectividad del hábitat.

pt.description: O orangotango-de-tapanuli é a espécie de grande símio descrita mais recentemente, identificada em 2017, e vive em um pequeno trecho de floresta montanhosa no norte de Sumatra.
pt.endangerment: Sua área de distribuição completa abrange apenas alguns centenas de quilômetros quadrados e está sob pressão de uma barragem hidrelétrica proposta, invasão agrícola e caça ilegal.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta tropical montanhosa e submontana intacta no ecossistema Batang Toru, Sumatra, livre do desenvolvimento de infraestrutura em grande escala.
pt.actions: Oponha-se a projetos de infraestrutura que fragmentem a floresta Batang Toru, apoie a legislação de proteção de grandes símios na Indonésia e finance estudos de conectividade do habitat.

fr.description: L'orang-outan de Tapanuli est la dernière espèce de grand singe décrite, identifiée en 2017, et vit dans un petit fragment de forêt de montagne dans le nord de Sumatra.
fr.endangerment: Son aire de répartition totale ne couvre que quelques centaines de kilomètres carrés et est soumise à la pression d'un barrage hydroélectrique proposé, à l'empiètement agricole et à la chasse illégale.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt tropicale montagnarde et submontagnarde intacte dans l'écosystème de Batang Toru, à Sumatra, exempte de développements d'infrastructure à grande échelle.
fr.actions: Opposez-vous aux projets d'infrastructure fragmentant la forêt de Batang Toru, soutenez la législation de protection des grands singes en Indonésie et financez des études de connectivité de l'habitat.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The Hainan gibbon is widely regarded as the world's rarest primate, confined to a single nature reserve on the tropical island of Hainan, China.
endangerment: Extensive logging across Hainan in the 20th century eliminated nearly all suitable forest, reducing the population to a tiny number of family groups.
ecosystemNeeds: Tall, old-growth tropical forest in Bawangling National Nature Reserve, with continuous canopy for arboreal movement and fruiting trees year-round.
actions: Support reforestation to link fragmented forest patches in Bawangling, back China's gibbon monitoring programmes, and advocate for stronger Hainan forest protection.

en.description: The Hainan gibbon is widely regarded as the world's rarest primate, confined to a single nature reserve on the tropical island of Hainan, China.
en.endangerment: Extensive logging across Hainan in the 20th century eliminated nearly all suitable forest, reducing the population to a tiny number of family groups.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Tall, old-growth tropical forest in Bawangling National Nature Reserve, with continuous canopy for arboreal movement and fruiting trees year-round.
en.actions: Support reforestation to link fragmented forest patches in Bawangling, back China's gibbon monitoring programmes, and advocate for stronger Hainan forest protection.

es.description: El gibón de Hainan es considerado ampliamente el primate más raro del mundo, confinado a una única reserva natural en la isla tropical de Hainan, China.
es.endangerment: La tala masiva en Hainan durante el siglo XX eliminó casi todo el bosque adecuado, reduciendo la población a un número pequeñísimo de grupos familiares.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque tropical alto y antiguo en la Reserva Natural Nacional de Bawangling, con un dosel continuo para el movimiento arborícola y árboles frutales durante todo el año.
es.actions: Apoya la reforestación para conectar parches de bosque fragmentados en Bawangling, respalda los programas de monitoreo de gibones de China y aboga por una mayor protección forestal en Hainan.

pt.description: O gibão-de-hainan é amplamente considerado o primata mais raro do mundo, confinado a uma única reserva natural na ilha tropical de Hainan, China.
pt.endangerment: O desmatamento extensivo em Hainan no século XX eliminou quase toda a floresta adequada, reduzindo a população a um número minúsculo de grupos familiares.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta tropical alta e antiga na Reserva Natural Nacional de Bawangling, com dossel contínuo para movimento arborícola e árvores frutíferas ao longo do ano.
pt.actions: Apoie o reflorestamento para conectar fragmentos de floresta em Bawangling, respalda os programas de monitoramento de gibões da China e defenda uma proteção florestal mais forte em Hainan.

fr.description: Le gibbon de Hainan est considéré comme le primate le plus rare du monde, confiné à une seule réserve naturelle sur l'île tropicale de Hainan, en Chine.
fr.endangerment: La déforestation intensive à Hainan au XXe siècle a éliminé presque toute la forêt adéquate, réduisant la population à un tout petit nombre de groupes familiaux.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Une forêt tropicale haute et ancienne dans la Réserve naturelle nationale de Bawangling, avec une canopée continue pour les déplacements arboricoles et des arbres fruitiers toute l'année.
fr.actions: Soutenez le reboisement pour relier les fragments forestiers de Bawangling, appuyez les programmes de surveillance des gibbons en Chine et plaidez pour une protection forestière renforcée à Hainan.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The wild Bactrian camel is a distinct species from its domestic cousin, surviving in some of the most remote and harsh deserts of China and Mongolia.
endangerment: Hunting, competition with domestic livestock for water, and habitat loss to mining and human settlement have severely reduced the wild population.
ecosystemNeeds: Remote, cold desert and semi-desert terrain in the Gobi and Taklamakan regions, with access to water sources and salt flats for mineral intake.
actions: Support the Wild Camel Protection Foundation's protected area work in China and Mongolia, and back international agreements limiting mining near camel habitat.

en.description: The wild Bactrian camel is a distinct species from its domestic cousin, surviving in some of the most remote and harsh deserts of China and Mongolia.
en.endangerment: Hunting, competition with domestic livestock for water, and habitat loss to mining and human settlement have severely reduced the wild population.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Remote, cold desert and semi-desert terrain in the Gobi and Taklamakan regions, with access to water sources and salt flats for mineral intake.
en.actions: Support the Wild Camel Protection Foundation's protected area work in China and Mongolia, and back international agreements limiting mining near camel habitat.

es.description: El camello bactriano salvaje es una especie distinta de su primo doméstico, que sobrevive en algunos de los desiertos más remotos y hostiles de China y Mongolia.
es.endangerment: La caza, la competencia con el ganado doméstico por el agua y la pérdida de hábitat por la minería y el asentamiento humano han reducido gravemente la población silvestre.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Terreno desértico y semidesértico remoto y frío en las regiones del Gobi y Taklamakan, con acceso a fuentes de agua y salinas para la ingesta de minerales.
es.actions: Apoya el trabajo de áreas protegidas de la Wild Camel Protection Foundation en China y Mongolia, y respalda acuerdos internacionales que limiten la minería cerca del hábitat del camello.

pt.description: O camelo-bactriano-selvagem é uma espécie distinta de seu primo doméstico, sobrevivendo em alguns dos desertos mais remotos e hostis da China e da Mongólia.
pt.endangerment: A caça, a competição com o gado doméstico pela água e a perda de habitat pela mineração e assentamento humano reduziram gravemente a população selvagem.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Terreno desértico e semidesértico remoto e frio nas regiões do Gobi e do Taklamakan, com acesso a fontes de água e salinas para ingestão de minerais.
pt.actions: Apoie o trabalho de áreas protegidas da Wild Camel Protection Foundation na China e na Mongólia, e respalda acordos internacionais que limitem a mineração perto do habitat do camelo.

fr.description: Le chameau de Bactriane sauvage est une espèce distincte de son cousin domestique, survivant dans certains des déserts les plus reculés et hostiles de Chine et de Mongolie.
fr.endangerment: La chasse, la concurrence avec le bétail domestique pour l'eau et la perte d'habitat due à l'exploitation minière et à l'installation humaine ont sévèrement réduit la population sauvage.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Un terrain désertique et semi-désertique reculé et froid dans les régions du Gobi et du Taklamakan, avec accès à des points d'eau et des salines pour l'apport en minéraux.
fr.actions: Soutenez le travail de la Wild Camel Protection Foundation sur les zones protégées en Chine et en Mongolie, et appuyez les accords internationaux limitant l'exploitation minière près de l'habitat du chameau.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The spoon-billed sandpiper is a tiny wading bird with a distinctive spatula-shaped bill, breeding in Russia and wintering on coastal mudflats of South and Southeast Asia.
endangerment: Rapid loss of tidal mudflat staging and wintering sites to reclamation projects along the East Asian flyway, combined with trapping in wintering grounds, has caused severe decline.
ecosystemNeeds: Intact coastal mudflat and estuarine habitats at key staging sites along the Yellow Sea and at wintering grounds in Bangladesh, Myanmar, and Thailand.
actions: Support Yellow Sea intertidal wetland protection, advocate for a ban on shorebird trapping along the flyway, and back captive head-starting programmes.

en.description: The spoon-billed sandpiper is a tiny wading bird with a distinctive spatula-shaped bill, breeding in Russia and wintering on coastal mudflats of South and Southeast Asia.
en.endangerment: Rapid loss of tidal mudflat staging and wintering sites to reclamation projects along the East Asian flyway, combined with trapping in wintering grounds, has caused severe decline.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Intact coastal mudflat and estuarine habitats at key staging sites along the Yellow Sea and at wintering grounds in Bangladesh, Myanmar, and Thailand.
en.actions: Support Yellow Sea intertidal wetland protection, advocate for a ban on shorebird trapping along the flyway, and back captive head-starting programmes.

es.description: El correlimos de pico de espátula es una pequeña ave limícola con un pico distintivo en forma de espátula, que cría en Rusia e inverna en las marismas costeras del sur y sureste asiático.
es.endangerment: La rápida pérdida de marismas de bajío cruciales para la escala y el invierno debido a proyectos de reclamación a lo largo de la ruta migratoria del este asiático, combinada con la captura en los cuarteles de invierno, ha causado un grave declive.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Hábitats costeros de marismas y estuarios intactos en sitios clave de escala a lo largo del Mar Amarillo y en cuarteles de invierno en Bangladesh, Myanmar y Tailandia.
es.actions: Apoya la protección de los humedales intermareales del Mar Amarillo, aboga por la prohibición de la captura de aves limícolas a lo largo de la ruta migratoria y respalda los programas de cría en cautividad.

pt.description: o maçarico-de-bico-de-colher é uma pequena ave limícola com um bico distintivo em forma de espátula, que cria na Rússia e inverna nos pântanos costeiros do sul e sudeste asiático.
pt.endangerment: A rápida perda de habitats críticos de marismas e estuários de paragem e invernada para projetos de aterro ao longo da rota migratória do Leste Asiático, combinada com a captura nos quartéis de inverno, causou um declínio grave.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Habitats costeiros de marismas e estuários intactos em locais-chave de paragem ao longo do Mar Amarelo e nos quartéis de inverno em Bangladesh, Mianmar e Tailândia.
pt.actions: Apoie a proteção dos húmidos intertidais do Mar Amarelo, defenda a proibição da captura de aves limícolas ao longo da rota migratória e respalda os programas de criação em cativeiro.

fr.description: Le bécasseau spatule est un petit limicole au bec distinctif en forme de spatule, se reproduisant en Russie et hivernant sur les vasières côtières d'Asie du Sud et du Sud-Est.
fr.endangerment: La perte rapide des vasières côtières cruciales pour la halte et l'hivernage dues aux projets de remblaiement le long de la voie de migration d'Asie de l'Est, combinée au piégeage sur les quartiers d'hiver, a provoqué un grave déclin.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des habitats de vasières et d'estuaires côtiers intacts dans les sites de halte clés le long de la mer Jaune et dans les quartiers d'hiver au Bangladesh, en Birmanie et en Thaïlande.
fr.actions: Soutenez la protection des zones humides intertidales de la mer Jaune, plaidez pour une interdiction du piégeage des limicoles le long de la voie de migration et appuyez les programmes d'élevage en captivité.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.
description: The forest owlet is a small, stocky owl found only in a few isolated patches of dry deciduous forest in central India, rediscovered in 1997 after more than a century with no confirmed sightings.
endangerment: Deforestation for agriculture and timber, combined with its naturally small and fragmented range, keep the population critically small.
ecosystemNeeds: Dry deciduous and moist forest with open glades in Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra, and Gujarat, India, where it can hunt small prey on the ground.
actions: Support habitat protection in the Satpura and Melghat tiger reserve landscapes, fund owl survey work in central India, and advocate against illegal timber harvesting.

en.description: The forest owlet is a small, stocky owl found only in a few isolated patches of dry deciduous forest in central India, rediscovered in 1997 after more than a century with no confirmed sightings.
en.endangerment: Deforestation for agriculture and timber, combined with its naturally small and fragmented range, keep the population critically small.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Dry deciduous and moist forest with open glades in Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra, and Gujarat, India, where it can hunt small prey on the ground.
en.actions: Support habitat protection in the Satpura and Melghat tiger reserve landscapes, fund owl survey work in central India, and advocate against illegal timber harvesting.

es.description: El mochuelo de bosque es un búho pequeño y robusto encontrado solo en algunos parches aislados de bosque caducifolio seco en el centro de India, redescubierto en 1997 tras más de un siglo sin avistamientos confirmados.
es.endangerment: La deforestación para agricultura y extracción de madera, combinada con su rango naturalmente pequeño y fragmentado, mantienen la población en un nivel críticamente pequeño.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque caducifolio seco y húmedo con claros abiertos en Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra y Gujarat, India, donde pueda cazar pequeñas presas en el suelo.
es.actions: Apoyar la protección del hábitat en los paisajes de la Reserva de Tigres de Satpura y Melghat, financiar estudios de búhos en el centro de India y abogar contra la tala ilegal de madera.
